hero.title: A revolution disguised as an investment
hero.subtitle: La Crypta is an Argentine organization dedicated to the development, education, and sharing of knowledge within the Bitcoin and Nostr ecosystems.

community.title: We imagine a world where Bitcoin is the norm
community.description: Allowing every individual to have complete control over their wealth and privacy, without depending on governments or corporations.

projects.title: Our projects
projects.description: We are dedicated to creating products and experiences that make them easy to use, making them accessible to everyone.

lawallet.title: LaWallet
lawallet.description: We create infrastructure based on Lightning Network and Nostr to speed up your integration.

features.title: Infrastructure
features.description: Integrating Bitcoin should not be utopian. Build on a solid and flexible infrastructure, ensuring security and scalability.

features.title: Feature 2
features.description: Brief description of this second feature.

walias.title: Walias
walias.description: Merge the power of Lightning and Nostr to make Bitcoin as simple as sending an email.

features.title: Feature 1
features.description: Brief description of this first feature.

features.title: Feature 2
features.description: Brief description of this second feature.

halving_massacre.title: Halving Massacre
halving_massacre.description: Zap sats to boost your bolt power, survive random elimination rounds, and claim the prize pool by being the last player standing!

features.title: Feature 1
features.description: Brief description of this first feature.

features.title: Feature 2

pillars.title: What do we do?
pillars.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

values.title: We build based on
values.subtitle: in every project.
values.description: At La Crypta, each value drives our focus on creating efficient, secure, and open solutions, grounded in principles that guide all our work.
values.honesty_desc: Sincerity and transparency at all times
values.synergy_desc: Collaborating and working effectively to achieve common goals
values.liberty_desc: Having the ability to make decisions and act autonomously and responsibly
values.modesty_desc: Being willing to learn and constantly improve
values.merit_desc: Recognizing and valuing achievements. Rewarding effort and excellence
values.innovation_desc: Being creative, open to new possibilities, and constantly improving

question_1.title: What is La Crypta?
question_1.desc: We are a community dedicated to the education, development, and dissemination of the Bitcoin ecosystem in Argentina. We focus on providing independence and autonomy to the community

question_2.title: Why values?
question_2.desc: We value these concepts highly because we believe they are key aspects for our community to be what we aspire to and continue growing

question_3.title: What events and activities do you organize?
question_3.desc_1: We love to maintain constant and close communication with our community. That's why we organize these activities regularly:
question_3.desc_2: Every Tuesday at 6 pm on Discord and Twitch, where we gather to chat and share. A weekly moment where we talk about our projects, events, meet new members, discuss ideas, and more.
question_3.desc_3: Every Wednesday at 5 pm we learn something new, broadcasting it live on Twitch and Nostr.
question_3.desc_4: Additionally, once a month, we organize an in-person event, where we finally share in person.
question_3.desc_5: We invite you to join us in these activities and be part of our community.

question_4.title: What benefits are there to being part of the La Crypta community?
question_4.desc_1: Learning about Bitcoin, Lightning, and Nostr.
question_4.desc_2: Networking with other Bitcoiners, developers, and people from the crypto web3 world.
question_4.desc_3: Developing collaborative products with the community.
question_4.desc_4: Staying up-to-date on the latest news about Bitcoin.

question_5.title: How can I collaborate?
question_5.desc: Together we go further. We greatly appreciate and value the collaboration of community members in our projects. To volunteer for La Crypta, join our Discord!

question_6.title: How can I donate to the La Crypta community?
question_6.desc: You can do so by sending satoshis to pozo@lacrypta.ar through your Bitcoin Lightning wallet.

question_7.title: Why should I join the Discord channel?
question_7.desc: The La Crypta community practically lives on Discord. That's where we organize all our activities and chat daily. Additionally, on that platform, we have a collaborative radio, a bot to send satoshis, zapathons, different types of merits, the famous 💩, and much more…

cryptoLabs.title: Crypto Labs trains builders for Bitcoin, Lightning and Nostr.
cryptoLabs.subtitle: An open lab where new developers can learn by building, publish real tools, and use public infrastructure from day one.

highlight.label: Now taking shape
highlight.hackathonsDescription: La Crypta's Lightning Hackathons and practical experiences live here: learn by doing, as a team, with real deliverables.
highlight.reposDescription: Every initiative leaves behind code, docs, and tools anyone can study, use, and improve.

learn.title: Learn for real
learn.description: Starting from zero should not mean staying in theory. Crypto Labs is built around guided technical experiences, challenges, and real feedback.

build.title: Build in the open
build.description: Projects begin as public repositories, so entering the ecosystem also means leaving a trace and collaborating with other builders.

ship.title: Ship useful infrastructure
ship.description: We do not want dead demos. We want services, tools, and public nodes the community can use today.

mission.title: A technical on-ramp into the sovereign ecosystem.
mission.description: Crypto Labs exists to involve Bitcoiners technically, train new developers, and turn complex concepts into hands-on experiences. It is community, lab, and launch platform at once.

points.one: Programs and activities where people learn by building real tools.
points.two: Hackathons and challenges that turn curiosity into open source contributions.
points.three: Public infrastructure to experiment with Bitcoin Core, Lightning, Nostr, and more.

stack.title: Open services to touch the stack with your own hands.
stack.description: Crypto Labs will also run public infrastructure so learning does not depend on imagination, but on testing, integrating, and breaking things in a real environment.

bitcoin.title: Public Bitcoin Core node
bitcoin.description: An access point to explore the network, understand how Bitcoin's base layer moves, and build on top of a verifiable source.

lightning.title: Lightning node with channels
lightning.description: Infrastructure to open channels, experiment with liquidity, and learn how Lightning works in real scenarios.

nostr.title: Public Nostr relay
nostr.description: An open relay to publish, test clients, and understand the sovereign social layer without depending on closed platforms.

blossom.title: Blossom server
blossom.description: Image and file storage for experiences built on Nostr and other tools in the open ecosystem.

programs.title: From first commit to first public product.
programs.description: The goal is not just to teach concepts. It is to form people who can participate, contribute, and later lead their own initiatives inside the ecosystem.
programs.hackathonsDescription: La Crypta's hackathons are part of Crypto Labs: intensive spaces to learn, test ideas, and ship useful tools.
programs.opensourceDescription: Every cohort, hackathon, or experiment can become libraries, boilerplates, integrations, and reusable documentation.

newsletter.title: Get notified when we open access, publish repos, and activate new services.
newsletter.description: Nostr connection will come later. For now, this landing prepares the ground to capture interest and build a base of people ready to join when Crypto Labs opens.
newsletter.placeholder: This is where the newsletter signup form will live. In this first version we leave the CTA and the space ready to connect it later to the real subscription flow.
